message.content:
@startuml
class LCM as LCM
class Class ApplicationProperty as Class ApplicationProperty
class Class DscResourceBase as Class DscResourceBase
class Function ConvertTo-HashtableFromObject as Function ConvertTo-HashtableFromObject
class Function Test-DscParameterState as Function Test-DscParameterState

Class ApplicationProperty <group>
    - LCM : ApplicationProperty.Test()
    - Class DscResourceBase : ([DscResourceBase] $this).Test()
    - Function ConvertTo-HashtableFromObject : $this
    - Function Test-DscParameterState : Parameter: both Hashtables
    - LCM : Return Type: [Boolean]
endClass

Class DscResourceBase <group>
    - Class ApplicationProperty : $this
    - Function ConvertTo-HashtableFromObject : Return Type: [Hashtable]
    - Function Test-DscParameterState : Return Type: [Boolean]
    - LCM : Return Type: [Boolean]
endClass

Function ConvertTo-HashtableFromObject <group>
    - Class DscResourceBase : $this
    - LCM : Return Type: [Hashtable]
endClass

Function Test-DscParameterState <group>
    - Class DscResourceBase : Parameter: both Hashtables
    - LCM : Return Type: [Boolean]
endClass

@enduml
